activation_mode.mechanism: kiro_steering_inclusion_mode: Kiro steering files support always, conditional, auto, and manual inclusion modes

auto_memory.mechanism: Kiro does not have an AI-generated auto-memory system separate from user-authored steering files

cross_provider_recognition.mechanism: kiro_agents_md_recognition: Kiro reads AGENTS.md files from other providers in addition to its own steering files

file_imports.mechanism: kiro_steering_file_references: Kiro steering files can reference other files using @file syntax

hierarchical_loading.mechanism: Kiro steering files are project-scoped; no multi-level subdirectory hierarchy documented

providerExtensions.name: Inclusion mode frontmatter field
providerExtensions.summary: Frontmatter field controlling when a steering file loads: 'always' (every interaction), 'conditional' (when active file matches glob patterns), 'auto' (model decides based on relevance), or 'manual' (explicit user invocation via hashtag).

providerExtensions.name: File references (@path/to/file) in steering files
providerExtensions.summary: Body syntax '@path/to/file' that Kiro inlines into the steering context, enabling modular composition.

providerExtensions.name: Foundational steering files (auto-created)
providerExtensions.summary: Kiro auto-creates three baseline steering files on workspace init: product_requirements.md (business context), tech_stack.md (frameworks and tools), and architecture.md (organization patterns).

providerExtensions.name: AGENTS.md root file recognition
providerExtensions.summary: Kiro reads repo-root AGENTS.md as a steering source, matching the cross-provider AGENTS.md convention.

providerExtensions.name: Team steering via MDM or central repository
providerExtensions.summary: Organizations can deploy centralized steering files across all developer workspaces via MDM solutions or central repositories, enabling organization-wide standardization without per-workspace setup.
